plugins.name: ask-claude
plugins.description: Get a second opinion from another Claude instance

plugins.name: ask-codex
plugins.description: Get a second opinion from OpenAI Codex

plugins.name: ask-gemini
plugins.description: Get a second opinion from Google Gemini

plugins.name: ask-copilot
plugins.description: Get a second opinion from GitHub Copilot

plugins.name: ask-agy
plugins.description: Get a second opinion from Google Antigravity

plugins.name: security-scanner
plugins.description: Scan plugins and skills for security risks (multi-agent support)

plugins.name: extract-rules
plugins.description: Extract project-specific coding rules from codebase for AI agents

plugins.name: merge-rules
plugins.description: Merge portable coding rules from multiple projects into a unified rule set

plugins.name: caffeinate
plugins.description: Manage macOS caffeinate to prevent system sleep

plugins.name: peer
plugins.description: Peer engineer for code review, planning, and brainstorming

plugins.name: translate
plugins.description: AI-powered translation plugin with /tr command (--hq for high-quality)

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Guided development workflow: planning, review, implementation, testing, and rule maintenance

plugins.name: dev-workflow-bundle
plugins.description: Development workflow bundle (includes peer + extract-rules + dev-workflow + rules-review + tidy + prose-polish)

plugins.name: apply-rules
plugins.description: Apply organization-wide rules to projects (filter by tech stack, merge with existing rules)

plugins.name: rules-review
plugins.description: Check code changes for .claude/rules/ compliance using parallel sub-agent review

plugins.name: tidy
plugins.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then apply cleanup edits.

plugins.name: prose-polish
plugins.description: Refactor verbose or unnatural prose into concise, native-sounding text in a configured target language using a sonnet subagent (file mode rewrites in place, text mode returns the result)
